printed.name: Scissors
printed.setup: Lying on side in neutral spine position, bottom arm straight, head resting on arm, pelvis perpendicular to Mat, top arm holding pole, legs straight, aligned with trunk, hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed, top foot in strap

movement.exhale: Open legs to Scissors position (2 pulses)

cues: Create even V position when legs are open
